raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX I returned a set of items to XXXX XXXX XXXX using the XXXX label provided by them. Fedex label with tracking number XXXX. 

Tracking shows that merchandise was sucessfully returned on XX/XX/XXXX. Despite me following exactly the steps requested by the merchant, merchant refuses to refund me for merchandise. Amex is also not supporting me despite all the information I've provided.
